title: Startup Registration with Identity
content:
ID-->>API: M2M JWT
sub=client_id, scope=tenants:read
(no tenant_id / sid — service-level token)

API->>ID: PUT /api/v1/permissions/batch
Authorization Bearer M2M_TOKEN
Body {applicationId, permissions: [22 permission types]}

ID-->>API: 200 OK
(idempotent upsert — existing updated, new created)

API->>ID: POST /api/v1/applications/{appId}/role-templates
Authorization Bearer M2M_TOKEN
Body [4 default role templates with permission sets]

ID-->>API: Tenant list
(auto-filtered to orgs with active AMPS entitlement)

API->>DB: UPSERT tenant_configurations
(preserve AMPS-specific: timezone, date format)

Note over API,ID: Failure resilience: Steps 3-6 retry with exponential backoff.
Steps 7-9 failure: startup fails, container restarts.
